head: Intelli-Credit
problem: India faces a Rs. 25L Crore MSME credit gap — traditional underwriting is slow, biased, and incomplete. Intelli-Credit closes this gap with a 4-stage AI pipeline.
highlights: 4-stage pipeline with 5C scoring (25+ SHAP factors) for explainable credit decisions
GST/Bank/ITR cross-validation with Gemini RAG chatbot integration
AI-generated PDF CAM reports via 6 REST APIs — zero TypeScript errors, deployed on Vercel
impact: IIT Hyderabad Hackathon — End-to-end AI credit underwriting platform
tech: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Supabase, Tailwind, Vercel

head: Honeypot API
tagline: Threat Intelligence Platform for Malicious Traffic
problem: Cybersecurity teams lack real-time intelligence on malicious actors — traditional honeypots are passive and don't generate actionable threat data.
highlights: Designed honeypot REST API capturing and analysing malicious traffic patterns
Authored full API documentation and technical specifications from scratch
Deployed to Microsoft Azure App Service with CI/CD pipelines in production
impact: HCL GUVI India AI Buildathon — 40,000+ participants
tech: Python, FastAPI, REST API, Microsoft Azure, GitHub Actions

head: AadhaarIQ
problem: India's underserved populations lack data-driven representation. No platform existed to measure equity gaps in Aadhaar coverage across states and districts at scale.
highlights: Built first-of-its-kind Aadhaar Equity Index (5-dimension metric) across 36 states & 984 districts
Analysed 4.93M records using Isolation Forest (146 anomalies), K-Means, and Linear Regression
Gemini chatbot dashboard deployed on Render — projected impact 500K+ underserved citizens
impact: UIDAI Data Hackathon 2026 — Team UIDAI_6127 · Team Leader
tech: Python, Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Plotly.js, Gemini API

head: FinTrace
problem: Anti-Money Laundering detection requires multi-layered analysis of financial transactions — single-method approaches miss complex laundering patterns like circular transactions.
highlights: 5 detection algorithms: IQR high-frequency, 99th-percentile large-amount, multi-identity, NetworkX circular transactions, rapid-movement
Interactive spider-map visualisation for AML pattern analysis
8 REST API endpoints deployed on Render with GitHub Actions CI
impact: Personal Project — Production deployed on Render
